title: Quentin Tarantino interview: 'I'm shutting your butt down!'

markers.name: loaded_language
markers.excerpt: laying waste to a genocidal white racist class in the institution of slavery
markers.explanation: Uses emotionally charged, vivid phrasing ('laying waste,' 'genocidal white racist class') to frame the antagonists in maximally negative terms, intensifying moral justification for the revenge narrative.

markers.name: repetition_emphasis
markers.excerpt: this happens and this happens and this happens and this happens and that happens
markers.explanation: Repetition of 'this happens' is used rhetorically to dismiss the alternative (a straight historical retelling) as monotonous and inferior to the revenge framing.
